title: EpicGons
description: A datapack for the Hexlands mod which adds an amplified version of the Hexlands.
body:
A datapack made for the [Hexlands](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexlands) mod which adds a much larger scale version of the typical Hexlands.

The amplified world preset has:
* 200 block size
* about 11-12 blocks of stone brick for the hexagon borders
* Borders have a minimum height of 90 and can go as high as the world height limit (320).
* Biomes are the same, just larger.
* 100 block hexagon size for the nether, with open spaces of about 30-40 blocks in the middle.

There is also a teeny size which is very small hexagons if you ever wanted that.
